name: Favorite Pot Roast
recipeIngredient: 3 1/2 pounds beef rump or chuck roast
recipeInstructions:
1. Rub all sides of meat with salt, seasoned salt, seasoned pepper, and paprika.
2. In a slow-cooking pot, combine the seasoned beef with onion and bouillon. Cover and cook on low for 8 to 10 hours or until the meat is tender. Remove from the pot; slice.
3. If gravy is desired, thicken the juices with flour dissolved in a small amount of water after removing the meat from the pot. Vegetables such as potatoes, carrots, small white onions, celery, or turnips may be added with bouillon and cooked the same time as the meat.
